clear_warning.title: Clear Data
clear_warning.description.data:
The f%data/ directory stores all core application data, including cache, mods, settings, logs, and other related files.
Clearing this directory will permanently remove all contents. Missing files and directories will be recreated automatically, but all historical data and personalized settings will be lost.
If you need to proceed, it is recommended to create a backup via <fg:bright_blue>[Settings -> Storage Management -> Export Data]</fg> first.
<fg:red>This action cannot be undone!</fg>
clear_warning.description.cache:
The f%cache/ directory stores all cached assets.
Clearing this directory will permanently remove all contents. Missing files and directories will be recreated automatically, but all cached assets will be lost.
If you need to proceed, it is recommended to create a backup via <fg:bright_blue>[Settings -> Storage Management -> Export Data]</fg> first.
<fg:red>This action cannot be undone!</fg>
clear_warning.description.log:
The f%log/ directory stores all application and script logs.
Clearing this directory will permanently remove all contents. Missing files and directories will be recreated automatically, but all historical logs will be lost.
If you need to proceed, it is recommended to create a backup via <fg:bright_blue>[Settings -> Storage Management -> Export Data]</fg> first.
<fg:red>This action cannot be undone!</fg>
clear_warning.description.mod:
The f%mod/ directory stores all installed mods.
Clearing this directory will permanently remove all contents. Missing files and directories will be recreated automatically, but all installed mod data will be lost.
If you need to proceed, it is recommended to create a backup via <fg:bright_blue>[Settings -> Storage Management -> Export Data]</fg> first.
<fg:red>This action cannot be undone!</fg>
clear_warning.description.profile:
The f%profile/ directory stores all settings files.
Clearing this directory will permanently remove all contents. Missing files and directories will be recreated automatically, but all saved settings and personal preferences will be lost.
If you need to proceed, it is recommended to create a backup via <fg:bright_blue>[Settings -> Storage Management -> Export Data]</fg> first.
<fg:red>This action cannot be undone!</fg>
